title: Sample Persistent IDs Schema
description: Schema for persisting sample and period UUIDs across reindexing operations.  When a run is reindexed, these stored UUIDs are reused so that existing queries and dashboards continue to reference the same data without requiring UUID updates.

sample-persistent-ids.description: Metadata block containing the schema version for this persistent IDs file format.

version.description: The schema version this file conforms to.  Currently must be '2024.01.20'.

samples.description: The sample identification data, mapping the sample's numeric ID to its persistent UUID.

id.description: The numeric sample identifier within the run.

sample-uuid.description: The persistent UUID assigned to this sample.  This UUID is preserved across reindexing operations.

periods.description: An array of period identification entries, each mapping a period's numeric ID and name to its persistent UUID.

items.description: A period identification entry with its numeric ID, name, and persistent UUID.

id.description: The numeric period identifier within the sample.

period-uuid.description: The persistent UUID assigned to this period.  This UUID is preserved across reindexing operations.

name.description: The name of the execution period (e.g., 'measurement', 'warmup').
